name: Jarir Marketing Company
summary: Jarir Marketing Company, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the retail and wholesale trading of office and school supplies. It operates through Retail Outlets and Wholesale segments. The company sells office supplies, school supplies, books, computers and peripherals, computer supplies, smartphones and accessories, electronics, art and craft supplies, video games, smart TV's, and kids' development products, as well as after-sale services. It is also involved in the online sale of products through Jarir.com website and Jarir Bookstore app; and investment of office, retail, and residential properties. Jarir Marketing Company sells its products under the Jarir bookstore brand name. As of April 12, 2021, the company had 64 retail showrooms in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and other Gulf countries. Jarir Marketing Company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Riyadh, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
